title: [Skyship, The Cells]
description: Organic debris clutters the area that opens off of a red door.  Food scraps and organic waste mingles with decomposing bodies across a rough stone floor, which has been thoroughly discolored by the mess, and large and uneven crimson stains from where blood once pooled.  Tattered clothing ripped into makeshift bedding is pushed into loose piles against the bulkheads.  A series of opaque glaes orbs fixed to the top of each bulkhead light the scene in a perpetual, ethereal glow.
